content:
MODULE: cosmos.integration.diagrams
FILE: cosmos/integration/diagrams.py (137 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Diagram Specialist - Mermaid & Visualization.

"A picture is worth a thousand lines of code, especially if it compiles."

Features:
- Advanced Mermaid Support (Flowchart, Sequence, Gantt, State, Pie)
- ASCII Art Generation for Terminal Fallback
- Codebase Visualization (Directory Trees)

CLASSES:
- DiagramSkill: Diagram generation skill for creating Mermaid diagrams and ASCII visualizations.
  Methods: def generate_mermaid_flowchart(self, nodes: List[Dict[str, str]], edges: List[Dict[str, str]], direc
  Methods: def generate_sequence_diagram(self, participants: List[Dict[str, str]], messages: List[Dict[str, str
  Methods: def generate_gantt_chart(self, title: str, sections: Dict[str, List[Dict]]) -> str
  Methods: def generate_state_diagram(self, states: List[str], transitions: List[Dict[str, str]]) -> str
  Methods: def generate_directory_tree(self, root_path: str, max_depth: int=2) -> str
